findings.title: Oral disclosure marking trap
findings.clause: Oral disclosures are protected only if reduced to a marked writing within five business days.
findings.rationale: The marking process creates an oral disclosure gap and should be replaced with broader protection for non-written disclosures.

findings.title: Residuals carveout is too broad
findings.clause: Recipient may use residual knowledge retained in unaided memory for any purpose, including product development.
findings.rationale: The unaided-memory residuals right is broad enough to permit product development from confidential information.

findings.title: Return and destruction obligation is weak
findings.clause: commercially reasonable efforts to return or destroy ... within ninety days
findings.rationale: Return/destruction should be mandatory, faster than 90 days, and backed by certification.
